records.question: Which markets in China involve the film Rocky III directed by Sylvester Stallone, produced by United Artists, with a gross of at most 125049125 dollars, and have a Mass suicide type estimate where the low estimate is exactly 960.0 and the high estimate is at least 960.0?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT market.market_id FROM market
JOIN film_market_estimation ON market.market_id = film_market_estimation.market_id
JOIN film ON film_market_estimation.film_id = film.film_id
WHERE market.country = 'China' AND film.title = 'Rocky III' AND film_market_estimation.low_estimate = 960.0 AND film.director = 'Sylvester Stallone' AND film_market_estimation.type = 'Mass suicide' AND film_market_estimation.high_estimate >= 960.0 AND film.gross_in_dollar <= 125049125 AND film.studio = 'United Artists'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT market.Market_ID 
FROM market 
JOIN film_market_estimation ON market.Market_ID = film_market_estimation.Market_ID 
JOIN film ON film.Film_ID = film_market_estimation.Film_ID 
WHERE market.Country = 'China' 
AND film.Title = 'Rocky III' 
AND film.Director = 'Sylvester Stallone' 
AND film.Studio = 'United Artists' 
AND film.Gross_in_dollar <= 125049125 
AND film_market_estimation.Type = 'Mass suicide' 
AND film_market_estimation.Low_Estimate = 960.0 
AND film_market_estimation.High_Estimate >= 960.0
